reviews.review_title: game is direct copy of gorilla tag
reviews.review_description: downloaded this game thinking it was an underrated fan game that would be really fun, only to find out it’s almost a direct copy of the gorilla tag. the terms of service is gorilla tag’s, the maps are all gorilla tag’s work, and all the cosmetics are from gorilla tag. furthermore, having your name set at gorilla apparently breaks part of the game, and cosmetics don’t show unless you’re in front of the mirror. i do not recommend this game, and i don’t think that it should be out this early in the development process.
Ppl don't play this game but I think it's the best game without mods it's in a almost currently update but I feel like they should add mods hut chef's kiss
